Name: BigBubbleGoalArea
Notes: An area that pops any Big Bubble inside it, optionally activating its SW_A. This area renders a dark blue billboarded circular meter at the center of this area that turns yellow as it gets filled.

Obj_arg0.Name: Meter Capacity
Obj_arg0.Description: The capacity of the meter, in relation to Big Bubble size. Default is 1, which will activate the switch with the default Big Bubble size.

SW_A.Description: Activated when the meter has been filled.
